pi_items.source: Database file exists at this path containing Chinook SQLite data with 59 customers and 412 invoices
Task specification and export_result.sh script confirm expected output location
Task specification and setup_task.sh script confirm expected SQL save location

These columns are derived from: customers table (CustomerId, FirstName, LastName) and invoices table (Total summed for 2011). Verified by examining table schemas and setup_task.sh ground truth query (lines 82-110)
Verified by querying Chinook database: SELECT DISTINCT strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) FROM invoices returns [2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013]. Year 2009 contains invoice records.
Verified by querying Chinook database: Year 2010 is present in invoice data and will be used to identify dormant customers (those with no invoices in this year)
Verified by querying Chinook database: Year 2011 contains invoice records and represents the 'return' year for resurrected customers

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database (37 customers verified with real names and data structure: Luís Gonçalves, Leonie Köhler, François Tremblay, Bjørn Hansen, František Wichterlová, etc.) contains 412 invoices spanning 2009-2013. The dataset uses the real Chinook sample database from lerocha/chinook-database with dates shifted 12 years from the original 2021-2025 range. The task requires identifying 'resurrected' customers: those with invoices in 2009, zero invoices in 2010, and resumed purchases in 2011. The setup script seeds synthetic test data for customers 1-5 to create a controlled ground truth (customers 1 and 5 are the target resurrected customers, customers 2-4 are false positives for validation).
